title: chylismia claviformis var. typica
intro: Chylismia claviformis var. typica, also known as the Sego Lily, is a species of flowering plant in the family Onagraceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Chylismia claviformis var. typica include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve digestion, and reduce fever. The plant is typically prepared as a tea or tincture, and can also be used in salves and ointments to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
